case_title: ISMAEL, MANSOOR M. VS J & S AUTO REPAIR SHOP, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF ISMAEL, MANSOOR M.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY ISMAEL, MANSOOR M. AS TO DEFENDANT J & S AUTO REPAIR SHOP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY J & S AUTO REPAIR SHOP, INC. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ISMAEL, MANSOOR M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT J & S AUTO REPAIR SHOP, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT ISMAEL, MANSOOR M. DEFENDANT IS TO RELEASE PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT J & S AUTO REPAIR SHOP, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ISMAEL, MANSOOR M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT J & S AUTO REPAIR SHOP, INC. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO AMEND THE CLAIM TO $4500. IS GRANTED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
